---
title: "NYC TLC Yellow Taxi — Lakehouse Pipeline Report"
author: "Databricks Ingestion Lakehouse"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
          img { max-width: 100% !important; height: auto !important; }
        </style>
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
import os
from pathlib import Path

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.ticker as mticker
import pandas as pd
from databricks import sql
from databricks.sdk import WorkspaceClient
from dotenv import load_dotenv

load_dotenv(Path.cwd().parent / ".env" if (Path.cwd().parent / ".env").exists() else Path.cwd() / ".env")

HOST      = os.environ["DATABRICKS_HOST"]
HTTP_PATH = os.environ["DATABRICKS_HTTP_PATH"]
TOKEN     = os.environ["DATABRICKS_TOKEN"]
CATALOG   = os.getenv("DATABRICKS_CATALOG", "workspace")
BRONZE_SCHEMA = os.getenv("DATABRICKS_BRONZE_SCHEMA", "bronze")
SILVER_SCHEMA = os.getenv("DATABRICKS_SILVER_SCHEMA", "silver")
GOLD_SCHEMA   = os.getenv("DATABRICKS_GOLD_SCHEMA",   "gold")
VOLUME        = os.getenv("DATABRICKS_VOLUME", "raw_files")

conn   = sql.connect(server_hostname=HOST, http_path=HTTP_PATH, access_token=TOKEN)
cursor = conn.cursor()
sdk    = WorkspaceClient(host=f"https://{HOST}", token=TOKEN)

def query(sql_str: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    cursor.execute(sql_str)
    rows = cursor.fetchall()
    cols = [d[0] for d in cursor.description]
    return pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=cols)

VOLUME_PATH = f"/Volumes/{CATALOG}/{BRONZE_SCHEMA}/{VOLUME}"
DAY_NAMES = ["Sun", "Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat"]

# Last ingested month — update in .env when new files are uploaded (format: YYYY-MM)
LAST_INGESTED_MONTH = os.getenv("LAST_INGESTED_MONTH", "2025-11")

plt.rcParams.update({
    "figure.dpi": 120,
    "axes.spines.top": False,
    "axes.spines.right": False,
    "axes.grid": True,
    "grid.alpha": 0.3,
})
```

## Pipeline Overview

This report summarises the **NYC TLC Yellow Taxi** medallion pipeline loaded into
Databricks Unity Catalog.

```{mermaid}
%%| fig-cap: "Medallion architecture"
flowchart LR
    V[("83 Parquet files<br/>/Volumes/…/raw_files")]
    B["303 M rows<br/>Bronze<br/>tlc_trips_raw"]
    S["~250 M rows<br/>Silver<br/>tlc_trips"]
    G1["Gold<br/>trips_by_month"]
    G2["Gold<br/>trips_by_zone"]
    G3["Gold<br/>time_patterns"]

    V --> B --> S --> G1 & G2 & G3
```

---

## 1 · Ingested Files

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Parquet files in the Unity Catalog Volume

```{python}
#| label: tbl-files
entries = list(sdk.files.list_directory_contents(VOLUME_PATH))
files = pd.DataFrame([
    {"File": Path(e.path).name, "Size (MB)": round(e.file_size / 1_048_576, 1)}
    for e in entries if e.path and not e.is_directory
]).sort_values("File").reset_index(drop=True)
files.style.format({"Size (MB)": "{:.1f}"}).hide(axis="index")
```

:::

```{python}
#| label: file-summary
total_gb = files["Size (MB)"].sum() / 1024
print(f"{len(files)} files · {total_gb:.1f} GB stored in {VOLUME_PATH}")
```

---

## 2 · Table Row Counts

```{python}
#| label: tbl-row-counts
#| tbl-cap: "Row counts across all medallion layers"
bronze_rows = query(f"SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM {CATALOG}.{BRONZE_SCHEMA}.tlc_trips_raw").iloc[0,0]
silver_rows = query(f"SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM {CATALOG}.{SILVER_SCHEMA}.tlc_trips").iloc[0,0]
gold_month_rows = query(f"SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM {CATALOG}.{GOLD_SCHEMA}.trips_by_month").iloc[0,0]
gold_zone_rows  = query(f"SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM {CATALOG}.{GOLD_SCHEMA}.trips_by_zone").iloc[0,0]
gold_time_rows  = query(f"SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM {CATALOG}.{GOLD_SCHEMA}.time_patterns").iloc[0,0]
retention_pct   = float(round(silver_rows / bronze_rows * 100, 1))

counts = {
    "Layer": ["Bronze", "Silver", "Gold — trips_by_month", "Gold — trips_by_zone", "Gold — time_patterns"],
    "Table": [
        f"{CATALOG}.{BRONZE_SCHEMA}.tlc_trips_raw",
        f"{CATALOG}.{SILVER_SCHEMA}.tlc_trips",
        f"{CATALOG}.{GOLD_SCHEMA}.trips_by_month",
        f"{CATALOG}.{GOLD_SCHEMA}.trips_by_zone",
        f"{CATALOG}.{GOLD_SCHEMA}.time_patterns",
    ],
    "Rows": [bronze_rows, silver_rows, gold_month_rows, gold_zone_rows, gold_time_rows],
}
df_counts = pd.DataFrame(counts)
df_counts["Rows"] = df_counts["Rows"].apply(lambda x: f"{x:,}")
df_counts.style.hide(axis="index")
```

::: {.callout-note}
Silver retains **`{python} retention_pct` %** of Bronze rows after cleaning (removing nulls,
outliers, invalid dates, zero-distance trips, and dates outside 2019–present).
:::

---

## 3 · Monthly Trip Volume

```{python}
#| label: fig-monthly-volume
#| fig-cap: "Monthly trip count (Silver) — 2019 to present"
#| fig-alt: "Bar chart of monthly trip counts from 2019 onwards"
df_month = query(f"""
    SELECT pickup_year, pickup_month, trip_count, total_revenue, avg_fare,
           avg_distance_miles, avg_duration_min
    FROM   {CATALOG}.{GOLD_SCHEMA}.trips_by_month
    WHERE  pickup_year >= 2019
      AND  DATE_FORMAT(MAKE_DATE(pickup_year, pickup_month, 1), 'yyyy-MM') <= '{LAST_INGESTED_MONTH}'
    ORDER  BY pickup_year, pickup_month
""")
df_month["period"] = pd.to_datetime(
    df_month["pickup_year"].astype(str) + "-" + df_month["pickup_month"].astype(str).str.zfill(2)
)

labels = df_month["period"].dt.strftime("%Y-%m")
x = range(len(labels))

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 4))
ax.bar(x, df_month["trip_count"] / 1_000_000, color="#1f77b4", alpha=0.85)
ax.set_xticks([i for i, l in enumerate(labels) if l.endswith("-01") or l.endswith("-07")])
ax.set_xticklabels([l for l in labels if l.endswith("-01") or l.endswith("-07")], rotation=45, ha="right")
ax.set_xlabel("Month")
ax.set_ylabel("Trips (millions)")
ax.set_title("Monthly Trip Volume")
ax.yaxis.set_major_formatter(mticker.FuncFormatter(lambda x, _: f"{x:.1f}M"))
fig.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

---

## 4 · Monthly Revenue

```{python}
#| label: fig-monthly-revenue
#| fig-cap: "Total monthly revenue (USD) — 2019 to present"
#| fig-alt: "Line chart of monthly revenue"
rev_labels = df_month["period"].dt.strftime("%Y-%m")
rev_x = range(len(rev_labels))

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 4))
ax.plot(rev_x, df_month["total_revenue"] / 1_000_000, color="#d62728", linewidth=2)
ax.fill_between(rev_x, df_month["total_revenue"] / 1_000_000, alpha=0.15, color="#d62728")
ax.set_xticks([i for i, l in enumerate(rev_labels) if l.endswith("-01") or l.endswith("-07")])
ax.set_xticklabels([l for l in rev_labels if l.endswith("-01") or l.endswith("-07")], rotation=45, ha="right")
ax.set_xlabel("Month")
ax.set_ylabel("Revenue (USD millions)")
ax.set_title("Monthly Revenue")
ax.yaxis.set_major_formatter(mticker.FuncFormatter(lambda x, _: f"${x:.0f}M"))
fig.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

---

## 5 · Top 15 Pickup Zones

```{python}
#| label: fig-top-zones
#| fig-cap: "Top 15 pickup zones by number of trips"
#| fig-alt: "Horizontal bar chart of top pickup zones"
df_zone = query(f"""
    SELECT zone_id, pickups, avg_fare
    FROM   {CATALOG}.{GOLD_SCHEMA}.trips_by_zone
    ORDER  BY pickups DESC
    LIMIT  15
""")
df_zone = df_zone.sort_values("pickups")

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(9, 5))
ax.barh(df_zone["zone_id"].astype(str), df_zone["pickups"] / 1_000_000, color="#2ca02c", alpha=0.85)
ax.set_xlabel("Pickups (millions)")
ax.set_title("Top 15 Pickup Zones (by Zone ID)")
ax.xaxis.set_major_formatter(mticker.FuncFormatter(lambda x, _: f"{x:.1f}M"))
fig.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

---

## 6 · Hourly Demand Heatmap

```{python}
#| label: fig-heatmap
#| fig-cap: "Trip demand heatmap — hour of day × day of week"
#| fig-alt: "Heatmap showing trip counts by hour and day of week"
df_time = query(f"""
    SELECT pickup_hour, pickup_day_of_week, trip_count, avg_duration_min, avg_fare
    FROM   {CATALOG}.{GOLD_SCHEMA}.time_patterns
    ORDER  BY pickup_day_of_week, pickup_hour
""")

pivot = df_time.pivot(index="pickup_hour", columns="pickup_day_of_week", values="trip_count")
day_labels = ["Sun", "Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat"]

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 7))
im = ax.imshow(pivot.values / 1_000_000, aspect="auto", cmap="YlOrRd")
ax.set_xticks(range(7))
ax.set_xticklabels(day_labels)
ax.set_yticks(range(24))
ax.set_yticklabels([f"{h:02d}:00" for h in range(24)])
ax.set_title("Trip Demand by Hour & Day of Week")
cbar = fig.colorbar(im, ax=ax)
cbar.set_label("Trips (millions)")
fig.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

---

## 7 · Average Fare Inflation Over Time

```{python}
#| label: fig-fare-trend
#| fig-cap: "Average fare per trip by year — showing post-COVID price inflation"
#| fig-alt: "Bar chart of average fare per year"
df_avg_fare = df_month.groupby("pickup_year")["avg_fare"].mean().reset_index()
df_avg_fare = df_avg_fare.rename(columns={"pickup_year": "year"})

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
bars = ax.bar(df_avg_fare["year"].astype(str), df_avg_fare["avg_fare"], color="#9467bd", alpha=0.85)
ax.bar_label(bars, fmt="$%.2f", padding=4, fontsize=9)
ax.set_xlabel("Year")
ax.set_ylabel("Avg Fare (USD)")
ax.set_title("Average Fare Per Trip by Year")
ax.set_ylim(0, df_avg_fare["avg_fare"].max() * 1.2)
fig.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

---

## 8 · Weekend vs Weekday Demand

```{python}
#| label: fig-weekend-weekday
#| fig-cap: "Total trips by hour — weekday vs weekend"
#| fig-alt: "Line chart comparing weekday and weekend hourly trip volumes"
df_time_wk = df_time.copy()
df_time_wk["is_weekend"] = df_time_wk["pickup_day_of_week"].isin([1, 7])  # Sun=1, Sat=7

df_wk = df_time_wk.groupby(["pickup_hour", "is_weekend"])["trip_count"].sum().reset_index()
weekday = df_wk[~df_wk["is_weekend"]].sort_values("pickup_hour")
weekend = df_wk[df_wk["is_weekend"]].sort_values("pickup_hour")

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(11, 4))
ax.plot(weekday["pickup_hour"], weekday["trip_count"] / 1_000_000, label="Weekday", color="#1f77b4", linewidth=2, marker="o", markersize=4)
ax.plot(weekend["pickup_hour"], weekend["trip_count"] / 1_000_000, label="Weekend", color="#ff7f0e", linewidth=2, marker="o", markersize=4)
ax.set_xticks(range(24))
ax.set_xticklabels([f"{h:02d}:00" for h in range(24)], rotation=45, ha="right")
ax.set_xlabel("Hour of Day")
ax.set_ylabel("Trips (millions)")
ax.set_title("Weekday vs Weekend Hourly Demand")
ax.legend()
fig.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

---

## 9 · Zone Revenue Concentration (Pareto)

```{python}
#| label: fig-pareto
#| fig-cap: "Cumulative revenue share by pickup zone — top zones dominate"
#| fig-alt: "Pareto curve of zone revenue concentration"
df_zone_all = query(f"""
    SELECT zone_id, total_revenue
    FROM   {CATALOG}.{GOLD_SCHEMA}.trips_by_zone
    ORDER  BY total_revenue DESC
""")
df_zone_all["cum_pct"] = df_zone_all["total_revenue"].cumsum() / df_zone_all["total_revenue"].sum() * 100
df_zone_all["zone_pct"] = (df_zone_all.index + 1) / len(df_zone_all) * 100

p80_zones = df_zone_all[df_zone_all["cum_pct"] <= 80].shape[0]
pct_zones_for_80 = round(p80_zones / len(df_zone_all) * 100, 1)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
ax.plot(df_zone_all["zone_pct"], df_zone_all["cum_pct"], color="#2ca02c", linewidth=2)
ax.axhline(80, color="red", linestyle="--", linewidth=1, alpha=0.7, label="80% revenue")
ax.axvline(pct_zones_for_80, color="red", linestyle="--", linewidth=1, alpha=0.7)
ax.set_xlabel("% of Zones")
ax.set_ylabel("Cumulative Revenue %")
ax.set_title(f"Zone Revenue Concentration — top {pct_zones_for_80}% of zones = 80% of revenue")
ax.legend()
fig.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

---

## 10 · Trip Distance & Duration Trends

```{python}
#| label: fig-distance-duration
#| fig-cap: "Average trip distance and duration by year"
#| fig-alt: "Dual-axis chart of avg distance and duration over years"
df_dd = df_month.groupby("pickup_year").agg(
    avg_distance=("avg_distance_miles", "mean"),
    avg_duration=("avg_duration_min", "mean"),
).reset_index().rename(columns={"pickup_year": "year"})

fig, ax1 = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
ax2 = ax1.twinx()

ax1.bar(df_dd["year"].astype(str), df_dd["avg_distance"], color="#1f77b4", alpha=0.6, label="Avg Distance (miles)")
ax2.plot(df_dd["year"].astype(str), df_dd["avg_duration"], color="#d62728", linewidth=2, marker="o", markersize=5, label="Avg Duration (min)")

ax1.set_xlabel("Year")
ax1.set_ylabel("Avg Distance (miles)", color="#1f77b4")
ax2.set_ylabel("Avg Duration (min)", color="#d62728")
ax1.set_title("Average Trip Distance & Duration by Year")

lines1, labels1 = ax1.get_legend_handles_labels()
lines2, labels2 = ax2.get_legend_handles_labels()
ax1.legend(lines1 + lines2, labels1 + labels2, loc="upper left")
fig.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

---

## 11 · Key Insights

```{python}
#| label: insights
peak      = df_month.loc[df_month["trip_count"].idxmax()]
trough    = df_month.loc[df_month["trip_count"].idxmin()]
best_rev  = df_month.loc[df_month["total_revenue"].idxmax()]
avg_fare_overall = (df_month["avg_fare"] * df_month["trip_count"]).sum() / df_month["trip_count"].sum()

peak_label     = peak["period"].strftime("%B %Y")
trough_label   = trough["period"].strftime("%B %Y")
best_rev_label = best_rev["period"].strftime("%B %Y")

busiest_hour  = df_time.loc[df_time["trip_count"].idxmax()]
quietest_hour = df_time.loc[df_time["trip_count"].idxmin()]

# Fare inflation: first vs latest year
fare_first  = df_avg_fare.iloc[0]
fare_latest = df_avg_fare.iloc[-1]
fare_change_pct = round((fare_latest["avg_fare"] - fare_first["avg_fare"]) / fare_first["avg_fare"] * 100, 1)

# COVID recovery: first month back to ≥80% of pre-COVID peak, searched after the trough
pre_covid_peak = df_month[df_month["pickup_year"] < 2020]["trip_count"].max()
recovery_threshold = pre_covid_peak * 0.8
trough_idx = df_month["trip_count"].idxmin()
post_trough = df_month.iloc[trough_idx + 1:]
candidates = post_trough[post_trough["trip_count"] >= recovery_threshold]
recovery_label = candidates.iloc[0]["period"].strftime("%B %Y") if not candidates.empty else "Not yet recovered"

# Weekend vs weekday: peak hour difference
weekday_peak = weekday.loc[weekday["trip_count"].idxmax()]
weekend_peak = weekend.loc[weekend["trip_count"].idxmax()]

# Distance trend: most vs least recent year
dist_first  = df_dd.iloc[0]
dist_latest = df_dd.iloc[-1]
dist_change = round(dist_latest["avg_distance"] - dist_first["avg_distance"], 2)
dist_trend  = f"+{dist_change} mi" if dist_change >= 0 else f"{dist_change} mi"

insights = pd.DataFrame({
    "Category": [
        "Volume", "Volume", "Volume",
        "Revenue", "Revenue",
        "Demand patterns", "Demand patterns", "Demand patterns",
        "Trip characteristics", "Trip characteristics",
    ],
    "Metric": [
        "Peak month",
        "COVID trough",
        "80% recovery after COVID",
        "Best revenue month",
        "Average fare (2019–now)",
        "Busiest hour (weekday)",
        "Busiest hour (weekend)",
        "Quietest hour",
        "Avg fare increase since 2019",
        f"Avg trip distance change ({int(dist_first['year'])}→{int(dist_latest['year'])})",
    ],
    "Value": [
        f"{peak_label} — {peak['trip_count']:,.0f} trips",
        f"{trough_label} — {trough['trip_count']:,.0f} trips (−{round((1 - trough['trip_count']/pre_covid_peak)*100)}% vs pre-COVID peak)",
        f"{recovery_label} (≥80% of pre-COVID peak)",
        f"{best_rev_label} — ${best_rev['total_revenue']:,.0f}",
        f"${avg_fare_overall:.2f}",
        f"{int(weekday_peak['pickup_hour']):02d}:00",
        f"{int(weekend_peak['pickup_hour']):02d}:00",
        f"{int(quietest_hour['pickup_hour']):02d}:00 on {DAY_NAMES[int(quietest_hour['pickup_day_of_week'])]}",
        f"${fare_first['avg_fare']:.2f} → ${fare_latest['avg_fare']:.2f} (+{fare_change_pct}%)",
        dist_trend,
    ],
})
insights.style.hide(axis="index")
```

::: {.callout-important}
## COVID-19 Impact
April 2020 saw a **~90% collapse** in NYC taxi ridership. The fleet did not recover
to 80% of pre-COVID trip volume until **`{python} recovery_label`**.
:::

---

```{python}
#| label: teardown
#| include: false
cursor.close()
conn.close()
```

*Generated with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) · Data source: NYC TLC Trip Record Data via Databricks Unity Catalog*
